name: Cumberland Cape Atlantic YMCA
description: Members only open play; however the YMCA also offers beginner clinics taught by an IPTPA certified instructor. Registration required and can be member or non member. See website for court open play schedule. Www.ccaymca.org

name: Cumberland County Technical School
description: Cumberland County Technical School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Vineland, NJ. There are 8 wood and asphalt courts. 4 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
open_play_schedule: Tues, Thurs night indoors winter only

name: Faith Bible Church
description: Faith Bible Church is a place to play pickleball in Vineland, NJ. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: John C Gittone Park
description: John C Gittone Park is a place to play pickleball in Vineland, NJ. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. Players have access to lights.

name: New Jersey Motorsports Club
description: Come play pickleball at New Jersey Motorsports Club in Millville, NJ! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include food and restrooms.

name: Pagliughi Park
description: Come play pickleball at Pagliughi Park in Vineland, NJ! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
